HKN Maker workshops are a series of weekend-afternoon workshops, open to all current high school students, that serve as an introduction to interesting and relevant EECS topics of today. We have offered lessons on everything from 3D modeling and prin

ed lessons on everything from 3D modeling and printing, computer vision, microcontrollers, IoT (Internet of Things) devices, and much more. Event Dates: Current maker workshops will be on March 9th, 2019 from 11:00AM - 1:00PM March 16th, 2019 from 11

019 from 11:00AM - 1:00PM March 16th, 2019 from 11:00AM - 1:00PM April 20th, 2019 from 11:00AM - 1:00PM All maker workshops will begin at the third floor entrance to Soda Hall . The pin is right on top of the third floor entrance. Sign up here! :) Ad
